title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: The video outlines five best practices for deploying TypeScript AI agents to production: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost controls via lifecycle hooks and model routing, and observability through metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. These patterns apply across platforms but are demonstrated using AWS services and the Strands Agents SDK.
